# FAF Test Project

## Overview
A test project for validating FAF-Conductor interoperability. This demonstrates seamless context exchange between formats.

## Goals
- Achieve universal AI context portability
- Support bidirectional format conversion
- Maintain data integrity during transforms

## Target Users
- AI developers building context-aware applications
- Teams using multiple AI tools
- Open source contributors

## Key Features
- IANA-registered format support
- Real-time sync capabilities
- Championship-grade validation
